title: LoverMods
description: LoverMods is a utility mod for Lovercraft dedicated to making the server more together. The mod features farming, skin trading and other misc changes.
body:
![LoverMods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a722f3b91f550c2f56c23d1cc41b4a196b9f72ca.png)LoverMods is a Utility mod for the server LoverCraft. LoverMods features many mods that help with Netherwart Farming, skin trading and more! The mod is in super early access with more modules on the way. LoverMods makes skin trading easier by giving you info on skins in game instead of having to tab out to look at other sources!

- **FarmerAddons** and **LoverMods** have merged!
- Netherwart middle row highlighter to keep you on track when farming
- Skin Value Checker (**hover** over any skin in skindex or in a players inventory for info on the skin!)
- /RefreshSkins to **update the skin list** or wait an hour for auto updates
- Update Notifier in game (when a new version drops you can choose to download the update)
- Config GUI
-# open it by pressing M or changing the keybind in minecraft settings
- Dungeon Auto Invite command
- Auto GG on Rank-ups
- Trade Menu GUI
- **View skin info on item frames**
- Updated to versions 1.21.4-1.21.10


**Please note we are not affiliated with LoverCraft LLC**
